banner.title: Downloads Center
banner.subtitle: Find the most-requested forms, school references, and official files in one organized hub.

intro.title: Quick Access for Families and Learners
intro.description: Use this page to open, save, or print the files most commonly requested by parents, students, and stakeholders. For best results on mobile, open the file first and use your browser's share or download option.

files.title: Confirmation Slip (Continuing Students)
files.description: Required for continuing students (Grades 8, 9, 10, and 12) to confirm their intent to enroll.

files.title: Basic Education Enrollment Form (BEEF)
files.description: Official PDF form for new student registration and document preparation.

files.title: School Calendar Image
files.description: Printable school year overview for families who want a quick reference at home.

files.title: Student Handbook
files.description: Official student code of conduct, academic policies, and school expectations.

files.title: Citizen's Charter
files.description: School service guide with processing steps, front-line services, and basic timelines.

files.title: School Report Card
files.description: Performance, enrollment, and school data report for stakeholders and the wider community.

files.title: Annual Implementation Plan
files.description: School improvement roadmap and project priorities for the current implementation cycle.
